capability: structural-reveal discrimination — isolate a line whose bond joins two previously-separate regions of the entity graph
claim: A bond between two STANDING entities sitting in separate graph components is a structural reveal; the interior connectivity channel (bridgeSurprise) fires maximally on it and ~0 on surface-matched controls (adjacent re-bond, fresh entity), while the mass-based one-surprise (bayesBits) does NOT isolate it (ranks fresh-mass lines above it); the connectivity reading is invariant to a surface emphasis cue.
stimulus_shape: text · discrimination+invariance · L3 · whole-reading · target CON
verdict: CONFIRMED — controls dark (adj=0, fresh=0), bridge unique-argmax on the reveal (1.0), bayes argmax elsewhere (gap real), surface-invariant (unmarked==marked)
mechanism: connectivity collapse over the CON/SIG bond graph: a bond's endpoints in different components -> 1, same-component geodesic delta -> (delta-1)/Dinf, adjacent -> 0; endpoints resolved through the CAUSAL SYN-merge identity quotient (the engine's own union-find, restricted to sentIdx<=cursor) so a reveal that names a standing entity by a new surface form is seen
fix_layer: interior (genome) — new src/core/bridge.js, exported from src/core/index.js beside surpriseAt; wired into src/perceiver/reading.js as an OPT-IN channel readingAt({bridge:true}) so the default path is byte-identical
root_cause_of_gap: the mass one-surprise (surprise.js) has no atom for connectivity — a bond among standing entities is a tiny mass deposit; the structural convergence leaves no trace in the figure field. The existing diagnostic (scripts/reveal-discrimination.mjs bridgeSurprise) located this but lived only in the read-only harness AND keyed on raw surface ids, so it MISSED short-name reveals and faked a 2-hop separation on adjacent controls.
parity: npm test 649->658 (9-test lock added), default readingAt byte-identical (bridge opt-in)
generalization: 194/194 lines of the original reveal-stimulus.json reproduce the prior raw-id bridge column EXACTLY (no regression); coref-resolution is a strict superset — identical where reveals use full names, strictly better on short-name reveals
omnimodal: CONFIRMED on a pure-operator log (no text/parser): cross-component bond -> 1.0, adjacent -> 0, SYN-coref reveal -> 1.0 — the mechanism reads only operators, so any organ emitting CON/SIG/SYN inherits it
scope_holds: any modality whose organ emits bonds (CON/SIG) and identity merges (SYN); structural reveals that join graph regions; reveals naming a standing entity by a new surface form
scope_fails: a reveal carried by NO bond (a pure predication/contradiction leaves connectivity unchanged — the enacted significance loop's province); convergence the weak SVO parser does not draw as a bond or shared object (front-end limit, not the channel's)

capability: context-sensitive novelty reserve — the mass reserved for an unseen atom tracks the recent newcomer RATE, not a hand-set constant
claim: The reserve novelty/(mass+novelty) with a fixed NOVELTY_RESERVE=1.0 is blind to newcomer recency (tracks only total mass). A signal-derived amplitude (the γ-decayed count of newcomer first-appearances) makes it high after a burst, low after a confirmation plateau.
stimulus_shape: membrane+music+text · constant-hunt+discrimination+prediction · L3 · across-window · target the reserve
verdict: GAP CONFIRMED + MECHANISM CONFIRMED (2 senses, AUC=1.0); generalization SCOPED (flat aggregate); fix NOT promoted
mechanism: noveltyAmplitude = Σ γ^(at-1-s) over each atom's first-appearance step s, carried as the `novelty` amplitude through the UNCHANGED Born step (surpriseAt/forwardDist). Context enters at the amplitude; the law does not move.
fix_layer: interior (genome) — new noveltyAmplitude in src/core/surprise.js, exported from src/core/index.js; wired into src/perceiver/reading.js behind RULES_REV (opts.reserve forces it for blind measurement). Flag off → byte-identical; flag on → 7 reserve-sensitive goldens shift.
root_cause_of_gap: NOVELTY_RESERVE is a hand-set constant in the predictive path — exactly the external assumption the signal should teach. The reserve only ever saw total accumulated mass, never the rate of arrivals.
parity: npm test byte-identical with the flag off (full suite green); the lock tests/novelty-reserve.test.js pins parity + mechanism + control
generalization: lag-1 newcomer discrimination across diverse real streams: metamorphosis +0.29, wiki(Mark Sanford) +0.25, esker -0.12, twinkle melody -0.43; aggregate -0.002 (flat). Tracking recent rate helps positively-autocorrelated novelty, regresses anti-correlated alternation. A smoother rate-normalized amplitude is strictly worse (0.371).
omnimodal: CONFIRMED — context reserve separates burst>plateau (AUC=1.0) in music AND text (different organs), plus a bare INS membrane (mechanism proof); the constant control cannot (matched mass)
scope_holds: the reserve now tracks recent novelty rate, removing the blind-constant defect, in any sense whose organ emits INS marks
scope_fails: a universal next-step prediction win — a rate-only amplitude ignores the autocorrelation SIGN of the newcomer process; promotion deferred (deeper gap: a reserve that learns lag-structure)

capability: expectation-violation significance — fire on a predication that contradicts an entity's established frame (the EVA/REC frame-break)
claim: A predication contradicting an entity's confirmed kind (Wren is a hawk, after Wren is a sparrow) should move belief more than a fresh frame-consistent predication of equal surface novelty (Wren is brown).
stimulus_shape: text+membrane · discrimination+diagnosis · L3 · across-window · target EVA/REC; matched-novelty control + a live bridge positive-control
verdict: GAP CONFIRMED — all three significance channels byte-identical on violation vs consistent (bayes/surprisal/bridge AUC=0.500, 4/4 pairs identical), instrument live (pc-bridge bridge=1.00). The engine has NO atom for expectation violation.
mechanism: none fires — the gap is the finding. bayesBits sees one new value either way; surprisalBits identical; bridge sees no bond (0).
fix_layer: NOT shipped. The clean fix spans two layers and must stay signal-derived (no hardcoded antonym/kind lists): (1) organ/convention — distinguish copular-NOUN (KIND, a functional slot held in the ledger) from copular-ADJ (ATTRIBUTE, additive); (2) interior — a revision/contradiction channel firing when a new value lands in an occupied functional slot, reading the existing relation-types functional/disjoint ontology, the EVA sibling of bridgeSurprise's CON channel, gated like bridge.
root_cause_of_gap: predicates are opaque slotless value-atoms (the text organ emits every copular predication as DEF(id,key='predicate',value=string)); a contradictory KIND and a fresh compatible ATTRIBUTE both deposit one new value. The membrane pair confirms it is representational, not a parser artifact: at the operator level a contradiction and an addition are the identical event.
parity: no production change — npm test unaffected (680 green); this cycle is a read-only diagnosis
generalization: the blindness is modality-agnostic (any organ emitting DEF predicates) and confirmed at the pure-operator membrane level, so it is interior, not a text-front-end quirk
omnimodal: N/A (no fix); the gap itself is shown interior (membrane pair) + text
scope_holds: the gap holds wherever predicates are slotless — i.e. everywhere today
scope_fails: n/a — nothing confirmed; the seed is the next structure to grow (the contradiction significance sibling)
